items.text:
Proud to announce that Tammy Doyle and I have been working on a new short film titled 'Breaking the Cycle'. 

Based on true events, ‘Breaking the Cycle’ tells the story of Mia, a young mother trapped in a volatile relationship with her partner, Darren whiling caring for her newborn baby Conor. As his behaviour worsens, Mia endures physically and emotionally, taking it for the sake of their child. However, when the abuse intensifies and now threatens young Conor, Mia knows she must act. Taking a chance. Leaving the only life she has known and risking everything for the sake of herself and more importantly her child. Making those important steps towards breaking the generational cycle of abuse. 

After some time prepping, we are now ready to cast and seek crew for our short film.

We are looking for a small crew to help on shooting days in departments such as camera, lighting, sound, costume, make up and production assistants. 

Below features the list of characters we are looking to cast:

 

MIA (Early to Mid-20s) - Female

A young mother trying to survive an abusive relationship while caring for her newborn son. Physically and emotionally drained, she feels isolated and unsupported, yet possesses a quiet strength and resilience. Her love for her baby ultimately gives her the courage to escape and rebuild her life.

DARREN (Late 20s) - Male

A volatile, controlling, and increasingly dangerous man. Struggling with alcohol and drug abuse, his behaviour swings between intimidation and violence. He is deeply insecure and becomes jealous of the attention given to his own child, leading to escalating abuse.

DARREN’S FATHER RICHARD (50s–60s) – Male

Dismissive and self-interested, and an abuser himself, he downplays the seriousness of the situation. More concerned about maintaining access to his grandson than Mia’s safety, he represents a generation that avoids confronting abuse directly.

MIA’S SISTER DONNA (20s-30s) – Female (NON-SPEAKING)

Must be able to Drive

Practical and supportive, Mia’s sister helps her escape despite the risks involved. While not deeply involved emotionally, she steps up when it matters, providing a way out when Mia needs it most.

This is a micro-budget project currently, but we are in the process of seeking funding. However, until then, the project is UNPAID, however travel expenses and catering will be covered at the very least. 

If you are interested in the project, please send your applications to shaundaly2510@gmail.com with name, character you would like to audition for or crew role you are interested in, head shots and showreels, past work and other media would be greatly welcomed as well. Deadline for Applications for both Cast and Crew will be on Midnight of July 10th, 2026. With auditions to be held on 15th and 16th July with one day on the Wirral and the other in Liverpool City Centre. More details will be given closer to the time.

CASTING CALL: Westhead

We are casting for THREE main roles for an upcoming short film to be filmed in Salford over 3-4 days in July 2026.

The film will be a part of the University of Salford MA Film Production: Major Project module. Written and directed by Hervey Bracken.

Please read the slides above for information on auditions via self-tape. Please share to actors who may be interested.

Email for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call Westhead Synopsis: Charlie. a teenage boy, is kicked out of school after a fight. He then must grapple with the repercussions and where he can go next. A film exploring neurodiversity in a UK school system. Filming in Salford/Manchester w/c 13th July-- or --W/c 20th July 2026 University of Salford MA Film Production short film Unpaid role as this is a student project but hoping to offer funds for travel and food. Contact: poemadjacentproductions@gmail.com for more information n auditions via self-tape. Please include character name in subject line. Deadline lune 29th.'

Zostały jeszcze dwie role do obsadzenia:

1. Eliza około 33 lat.
Jest to główna rola także proszę osoby z dużym doświadczeniem na planie.
Terminy zdjęć 21,22,23 czerwca.

2. Mateusz około 32 lat.
Epizodyczna rola na 21 oraz 23 czerwca. 
Odnośnie Mateusza proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia i okolic.

Zdjęcia odbędą się we Wrocławiu.
Produkcja Trudne Sprawy. 
Wynagrodzenie za rolę jak i zwrot kosztów podróży płatne gotówką na planie. Hotel na koszt firmy. 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na emial adres 
adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl z informacją wiek, jakie doświadczenie na planie, aktualne zdjęcia i numer tel.

Można też napisać komentarz pod postem.
Postaram odezwać się do każdego kandydata.

Do zobaczenia na planie ;)

items.text:
# **[KRAKÓW] CASTING NA PROWADZĄCEGO / WSPÓŁTWÓRCĘ PODCASTU WIDEO**

Szukam charyzmatycznego prowadzącego do autorskiego podcastu w Krakowie. Ty dostarczasz wizerunek, wiedzę i pomysł, ja zapewniam pełne zaplecze produkcyjne. Szukam partnera, a nie klienta do wynajęcia studia.

Jesteś aktorem/aktorką, świetnie czujesz się przed kamerą i masz nienaganną dykcję, ale oprócz tego masz unikalną wiedzę, pasję (niekoniecznie związaną z aktorstwem!) i znasz swoją niszę od podszewki? Świetnie. Ja dysponuję w Krakowie w pełni wyposażonym, profesjonalnym studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM, profesjonalne oświetlenie) oraz twardym technicznym know-how.

Połączmy te dwa kapitały. Stwórzmy format oparty na idealnej synergii i bezkompromisowej jakości.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka (Wizerunek, Charyzma i Merytoryka):** Jesteś twarzą, głosem i mózgiem operacyjnym w kwestii treści. Wykorzystujesz swój warsztat przed kamerą, ale wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na tym, w czym jesteś absolutnym ekspertem. Zapraszasz wartościowych gości, prowadzisz rozmowy, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz społeczność wokół formatu.
* **Moja działka (Technologia i Zaplecze):** Pełnię rolę Twojego technicznego wspólnika i producenta. Biorę na siebie 100% procesów realizacyjnych. Odpowiadam za wielokamerową realizację obrazu, zaawansowany montaż i profesjonalną obróbkę dźwięku (DaVinci Resolve). Wycinam z naszych nagrań dynamiczne formaty pionowe (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), optymalizuję je i ogarniam techniczną stronę dystrybucji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):** Gramy do jednej bramki. Nie płacisz mi z góry za wynajem studia ani za montaż. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami z monetyzacji (przychody z YouTube, wsparcie od widzów przez Patronite, kontrakty sponsorskie, lokowania, a w przyszłości własne produkty) dokładnie po połowie. Dzielimy ryzyko i dzielimy sukces.

Zależy mi na osobie, która podchodzi do biznesu z pełnym profesjonalizmem, ma na siebie konkretny pomysł i potrafi konsekwentnie działać. Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie i chemię przed kamerą, zrobimy na start 4-odcinkowy sezon pilotażowy (Proof of Concept). Zobaczymy, jak współpracuje nam się w praktyce.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję jednak maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi precyzyjnie i w szczegółach opisywać:
1. **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo docelowo ma trafiać?
2. **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty masz o tym mówić? Samo wykształcenie aktorskie to za mało – wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia ekspertyzy w wybranym temacie (poparte dowodami: doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty, konkretne zainteresowania).
3. **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów, znajomych lub współpracowników z danej branży, których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w projekcie w charakterze gości?

**Ważna uwaga na koniec:** Szanujmy swój czas. Jeśli Twoja wiadomość nie będzie precyzyjna i zabraknie w niej szczegółów dotyczących Twojego pomysłu, kompetencji oraz konkretnego zakresu działania – nie odpiszę.

Czekam na profesjonalne propozycje na priv.

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

🎭 Looking for actors, performers, models, and outgoing personalities who love creating memorable experiences!

Hi, my name is Haley! A little over a year ago, I started Coast 2 Coast Bubbles, a live entertainment company that brings the magic of giant bubbles to parties, festivals, schools, corporate events, and community gatherings.
Business is booming, and we're looking for more Bubble Artists to join our team!

If you love performing, engaging with crowds, creating magical moments, and bringing energy to events, this might be the perfect fit.
No bubble experience needed—we provide paid training! We're simply looking for reliable, professional, charismatic people who enjoy making people smile.

📍 Hiring in:�• Los Angeles�• South Orange County�• North Orange County�• Inland Empire�• San Diego

📅 Schedule:�Primarily weekends (ideal availability: 8 weekend days per month, Saturdays and/or Sundays)
Also seeking candidates with weekday availability!

✨ Perks:�• Highly competitive pay�• Compensated travel�• Paid training�• Tips�• A genuinely fun and joyful job�• Flexible, event-based scheduling

Interested? Send me a DM for more information!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

🎬 ŚWIEŻA PORCJA CASTINGÓW JUŻ CZEKA!

Marzy Ci się udział w serialu, reklamie albo filmie? A może po prostu chcesz spróbować czegoś nowego i przeżyć ciekawą przygodę przed kamerą?

Właśnie pojawiły się kolejne interesujące nabory z różnych części Polski. 👇

Wybrane aktualne castingi:

📢 Kampania reklamowa (Warszawa)
Nowe role dla kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18–50 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113847

🎥 Spot reklamowy (Bełchatów)
Produkcja poszukuje aktorów do komediowej reklamy.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113853

👔 Nagrania produktowe (Toruń)
Poszukiwani są modele do krótkich materiałów reklamowych.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113854

🤚 Reklama – modelka dłoni (Warszawa)
Casting dla kobiet w wieku 18–35 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113852

🎭 Serial „Ukryta Prawda” (Warszawa)
Poszukiwane są młode aktorki w wieku 18–23 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113844

🚔 Serial „Gliniarze” (Warszawa)
Trwa nabór kobiet i mężczyzn do ról epizodycznych.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113848

🎬 Film komediowy (Warszawa)
Poszukiwani są statyści w wieku 17–59 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113850

To oczywiście tylko część aktualnych ogłoszeń. Na stronie czekają również kolejne castingi do filmów, seriali, reklam, kampanii marketingowych i projektów internetowych.

👇 Wejdź i sprawdź szczegóły ogłoszeń.
Nie masz jeszcze konta? Załóż profil i wypróbuj wszystkie możliwości dzięki 30-dniowemu okresowi próbnemu VIP całkowicie za darmo.

🌐 www.easycasting.pl

Może właśnie teraz ktoś szuka osoby takiej jak Ty. 🎬✨

sharedPost.text:
While the world is focused on trophies, scores and headlines, I’m focused on becoming the best version of myself.

Every great story starts before the world notices it.
Every champion was once underestimated.
Every dream looked impossible before it became reality.

I don’t compete with anyone.
I compete with the person I was yesterday.

This is not the finish line.
This is preparation.
This is discipline.
This is vision.
This is BONeless.

One day people will say it happened fast.
But only a few will know how much work happened in silence.
  
The journey continues. 🖤
#boneless #lifestyle #usa #streetfashion #worldcup2026

items.text:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

items.title: JAKE UNGER
items.summary:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

[[[[https://jakeunger.carrd.co/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7Y7JCILWNd3yvE1Nh1rAFsmaii9B1hqP69vEkknXK4PWP1KH964zVA1l7Klg_aem_JSvt9qfa3ilmpl-4Rd-gfw&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4YIVuSRKBgjqgqOt70vL8Wze6e7yp3wDWXf5mVI9G2kw9V4hDNbZPAp41lGg_aem_8lt0y9Th0MenYdO8jRzXeg&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5RfwhAE6cPTf_AfSTOLxPeDNxrb0B-mCTmxEdVxvrnF4P3tgUP1xUULRdJYA_aem_a-jhprZs6s-moP5anA2myA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7s1SxnYbzI353sR61gJPwaj3F9LYMZrMDS-EmcP30gkd9 items.text:
CASTING CALL
SPIN CYCLE

Student Short Film | Aurora Cinematic Arts Department

Non-Union | Unpaid | Meals Provided

Casting Italian, Italian-American actors for Spin Cycle, a dark crime-horror short film produced through the Aurora Cinematic Arts Department.

This project is intended for actors looking to gain on-set experience, build their reel, and collaborate with other filmmakers.

“In a neighborhood ruled by organized crime, a simple cleanup job leads two wiseguys down a path of secrets, paranoia, and something lurking in their territory.”

SHOOTING LATE AUGUST EARLY SEPTEMBER, DATES TBD

SEEKING:

- JOSEPH CARUSO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 25-35

A capable mob hitman with sharp instincts and a quiet intensity. Joseph is observant, cautious, and far more intelligent than his peers give him credit for.

Lead Role

- CHRIS

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 22-30

Joseph's longtime friend and partner. Quick-witted, sarcastic, and constantly trying to lighten the mood. Chris often serves as comic relief but proves loyal when things become dangerous. A natural talker with strong comedic timing.

Supporting Role

- FRANK PALMIERI

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 55-70

An aging but powerful mafia boss. Frank is intimidating, sharp-tongued, and commands attention the moment he enters a room. He expects competence and has little patience for excuses.

Supporting Role

- MR. TEDESCO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 50-65

A burly neighborhood figure with a rough exterior and suspicious nature. Tedesco carries himself like someone who has survived a lifetime of street politics. Appears in several key scenes.

Supporting Role

- YOUNG MAN

Male | Italian / Italian-American Preferred | 18-25

A curious and seemingly harmless young man. Charming but slightly suspicious. Limited screen time.

Day Player

- BUTCHER 1

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A nervous worker involved in a gruesome operation. Physical role with minimal dialogue.

Featured Supporting

- BUTCHER 2

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A silent butcher working behind the scenes of the operation. Intimidating physical presence preferred.

Featured Supporting

- CULT MEMBERS

Male or Female | Any Ethnicity | 18-60

Members of a bizarre underground cult. Physical performers comfortable with stunt-style movement and horror elements are encouraged to submit.

Background / Featured Background

TO SUBMIT

Please send:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Demo Reel (preferred)

• If you do not have a reel, a short monologue is acceptable

Contact

kleverfilms.st@gmail.com

Please include the role(s) you are interested in and any relevant acting experience.

Non-Union • Unpaid • Aurora Cinematic Arts Department Student Production

Hiring – Art Director / Production Designer

Kentwood Films International is looking for a talented and creative Art Director / Production Designer for an upcoming independent feature film shooting in Chicago and surrounding suburbs.

We are specifically seeking experienced professionals based in the Chicago area.

Position: Art Director / Production Designer

Compensation: This is a paid position (compensation based on experience)

To Apply: Please send your portfolio, resume, and/or previous work samples to: kentwoodcinemas@gmail.com

items.text:
HOW I WENT FROM UNKNOWN TO BOOKING TWO NETFLIX SERIES
Hey everyone, my name is Freya Tingley 😃

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two NETFLIX series and LEAD roles in six feature films. I starred in JERSEY BOYS, directed by CLINT EASTWOOD, worked alongside JEAN-CLAUDE VAN DAMME, and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started acting when I was 14 and went from having no industry connections to signing with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood at 17, moving to LA at 18, and booking a series regular role on a NETFLIX show within three months of arriving.

Some call it luck. But it was STRATEGY.

Recently, I’ve connected with HUNDREDS OF ACTORS from all over the world, and one thing keeps coming up:

ACTORS WHO FEEL STUCK AND DON’T KNOW WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT.

Which is exactly why I created this.

A private, one-to-one CAREER MENTORSHIP SESSION over Zoom.

Together, we cover:
• The ONE SKILL every actor must have to consistently book work (hint: it’s not talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right REPRESENTATION
• What to focus on if you don’t have an AGENT, and how to actively work towards getting one
• What to do if your AGENT isn’t sending you AUDITIONS
• What to do if you’re auditioning regularly but not BOOKING (the key most actors miss)
• The MATERIALS you actually need, and what most actors get wrong
• How to stop waiting for opportunities and start strategically creating them for yourself
• Plus much more

You leave with the EXACT STRATEGY to move your career forward. The same strategy I used to go from UNKNOWN to WORKING ACTOR.

If you’re committed to becoming a WORKING ACTOR:
1. Comment “MENTORSHIP” below and tell me what you most need help with
2. Send me a direct message

I only have a handful of spots left this month. ☺️

IG: @freyatingley

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and people smiling

items.text:
Love queer cabaret? Join us tomorrow, Friday 19 June, as Queer Theatre brings 12 brilliant queer cabaret artists to the Two Brewers in Clapham for a big, sexy night of music, comedy, drag, spoken word, theatre and beautiful queer chaos.

Hosted by our very own Josh Sanchez, with Bran Isabella, Crispin Dipp, Gareth Williams, Grace Lightning, The W*nkers, Lady Harmony Heaven, Lee Campbell, Ryan Graham Hinds, Sir Lady Afrique, Sophia Kleanthous and Victor Von Plume.

Social by design. Hop on different tables to meet other queer creative people, plus special guests, main-stage cabaret afterwards and a DJ until 4am.

🎟️ Tickets are only £20 and now limited. Book via the Queer Theatre website. All profits supporting LGBTQIA+ theatre-projects.

items.text:
Short student movie from Croatia "The Last Days"
Dear all,

I am excited to share The Last Days, my graduation short fiction film, a project I have been working on for the past six months together with a wonderful creative and production team.

We have launched a crowdfunding campaign, and every contribution means a great deal to us.

Through the link below, you can find more information about the film, our team, cast, production costs, and what we are raising funds for. Any donation, no matter the amount, directly helps us complete the film and prepare it for its festival journey. The names of all donors will be included in the film’s closing credits.

The film needs to be fully edited by September 1, completed and ready for distribution by September 9, and we plan to submit it no later than September 12 to this year’s competitive short film programme Kockice at the Zagreb Film Festival. Fingers crossed we will see you there.

If you are not able to donate at the moment, sharing the campaign or following us on Instagram would also mean a lot: @posljednji_dani.film

All additional information is available through the link below.

Wishing everyone a wonderful summer, and thank you from the bottom of our hearts for every kind of support.
items.previewDescription: Short student film based in Croatia. A father-daughter drama about care, resentment and letting go. photos by / Iva Lemo and Lukas Kamber

**Statist søges til videooptagelse den 29/6 tæt ved Roskilde station**

 

**Tid:** ca. 3 timer – nærmere tidspunkt kommer senere

**Løn:** ulønnet, men du får et gavekort til 2x biograf billetter

 

👷‍♀️ **1 ung pige på ca 14 (i dit eget tøj)**

 

 

Skriv gerne til mig, hvis det er noget for dig, eller hvis du kender en, der kunne passe. På caba@detsocialenetvaerk.dk

 

 

Videoptagelsen skal bruges til at lave et online kursus for headspace Danmark, der skal inspirere til samtale.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - Lead Actress for short film "CONCEPTION"
We're looking for our Ellie.

"Conception" is a two-hander drama/sci-fi/horror - one location, one intense relationship, a lot of room for a great performance. Directed by Darren Henderson, produced by myself.

THE ROLE
Acting age 30–35
Ideally (but not exclusively) based in the North West of England
Comfortable with screen acting and playing nuanced, layered characters

THE SHOOT
3 consecutive days between 3–13 September (dates flexible to the right actress)
Filming in Lancaster

A bit of honesty about the project: this is a collaborative passion project. The role is unpaid, but we cover travel, accommodation where it's needed, and food on set. Our producer and crew are experienced - not first-timers - and we already have a fantastic male co-lead attached. Our aim is a calm, supportive set and genuinely strong showreel material, especially for actresses who've built up supporting credits and are ready to carry a lead.

We know paid-only is the right call for a lot of people, and that's completely fair - if it's not for you, no worries at all. If it sounds like your kind of thing, we'd love to hear from you.

📩 To apply, email: darren.a.henderson27@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you.

items.text:
Tonight is a very proud moment🎬

As a Mum/Agent, I couldn’t be prouder to be attending the London screening of *Angel of the North* this evening.

Knowing that Summer-Joules played the supporting lead role of Lucy makes this occasion incredibly special for us. Her hard work, dedication, and commitment to her acting journey have led to this wonderful milestone, and I am so excited to celebrate alongside the amazing talented cast, crew, and creative team behind the film.

A special thank you to Sean, whose talent, vision, and dedication brought *Angel of the North* to life. Not only did he direct this incredible film, but he also delivered a wonderful performance within it. It was a privilege for Summer-Joules to work alongside someone so passionate and committed to their craft. Sean's support, guidance, and belief in his cast helped create a truly memorable experience, and we're incredibly grateful to have been part of his journey with this film.

Wishing everyone involved a fantastic screening tonight. Here’s to an unforgettable evening and the continued success of *Angel of the North*.

#AngelOfTheNorth #LondonScreening #FilmPremiere #ProudMum #SupportingLead

items.text:
Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male 30-40 but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!!

topComments.text: I would love any part! And don't care about payment,did acting classes in Memphis and got headshots

items.text:
TITANIC AUDITIONS ARE IN ONE WEEK, COME AUDITION!

In Person Auditions: June 22 & 23 (5-8pm), At The Avon Free Public Library; 281 Country Club Road Avon, CT 06001, Board Room, 2nd Floor. Or Online Submission.

Come audition for the story about what happened on the Titanic. This special immersive production will be held in beautiful outdoor nautical gardens. All roles open, everyone is welcome to audition.

Rehearsals: July 7 July 8, July 12, July 21. July 22, July 28, July 29, August 4, August 5, August 9, & August 11 - 5:00 pm - 8:00 pm / Till Dusk, at 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032 (Outside Venue.)

Performance Date: August 16, 2pm. Performance Space: 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032. Volunteer, Non Union, No Travel or Board Provided.

Sign up Here: [https://forms.gle/87VRcCa6HVk4bSJ28](https://forms.gle/87VRcCa6HVk4bSJ28?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaDU1VkJYaFNIMEQ0RHZNSXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4mtr1o0pyFedAQ6QwUXH016O1fQT0H-rBawEOu7rCiUnSPI9pwkttPnrXdjg_aem_o477k7Cxl0P-DNikT4FyYw)

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

sharedPost.text:
UWAGA - CASTING!

Poszukujemy odtwórczyni jednej z dwóch głównych ról w filmie "Być tu oto", w reżyserii Magdy Matwijow, ze scenariuszem Magdaleny Kućki, produkcji Bahama Films :) 

Zapraszamy do kontaktu!

media.ocrText: Może być zdjęciem przedstawiającym tekst „CASTING DO GŁÓWNEJ ROLI W FILMIE „BYĆ πυ OTO POSZUKUJEMY DZIEWCZYNKI (12-14 LAT) POłUDNIOWY TYP URODY ·KOCHA ŚPIEWAĆ ·LUBI PłYWAĆ JEST ODWAŻNA Zgłoszenia imię nazwisko wraz z aktualnym zdjęciem kontaktem do rodzica prosimy wysyłać na adres: casting casting@bahamafilms.pl”

items.text:
CASTING – POSZUKUJEMY MODELKI 45+ DO APLIKACJI O ZDROWIU

Do realizacji materiałów wideo z ćwiczeniami dla aplikacji wspierającej zdrowie szyi i kręgosłupa poszukujemy modelki:

Kobieta 45+

Wymagania:

• jasne włosy (średniej długości lub dłuższe)

• zadbana aparycja, czysta skóra, brak tatuaży

• wysportowana, szczupła sylwetka

• dobra postawa ciała

Mile widziane doświadczenie związane z fitnessem lub aktywnością fizyczną, ponieważ ważne będzie technicznie poprawne wykonywanie ćwiczeń.

Ćwiczenia nie są wymagające fizycznie – aplikacja skupia się na zdrowiu szyi i pleców.

📍 Warszawa

📅 3 dni zdjęciowe na początku lipca

Przed zdjęciami odbędą się również 2 dni prób (po ok. 6 godzin każda).

💰 Projekt płatny.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać WYŁĄCZNIE na adres:

casting.shootins.warsaw@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu prosimy załączyć:

• zdjęcie dobrze widocznej twarzy

• zdjęcie całej sylwetki

• krótką informację o sobie

• informację o swojej dostępności w terminie pomiędzy 29 czerwca a 12 lipca

Referencje zamieszczam poniżej.

items.text:
**Może czas wykorzystać swoją energię w nowym formacie? ✨**

Szukamy osób z doświadczeniem w animacji, eventach, obsłudze klienta, sporcie, tańcu lub podobnych obszarach.

Jeśli dobrze czujesz się w kontakcie z ludźmi i potrafisz tworzyć atmosferę — **możesz odnaleźć się w roli instruktora ruchu i tańca w Arthur Murray!**

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia w prowadzeniu zajęć tanecznych — wszystkiego nauczymy Cię krok po kroku.

**Co zyskujesz?**
🎓 pełne szkolenie od początku
🌍 rozwój w międzynarodowej sieci
👥 klientów od studia
📈 jasną ścieżkę rozwoju
💃 codzienny kontakt z ludźmi, ruchem i emocjami
💰 wynagrodzenie 6500–9000 zł

📍 Wrocław / Warszawa

**Brzmi jak coś dla Ciebie?**
📩 Wyślij CV: arthurmurray.hr@gmail.com
📞 WhatsApp: +48 574 780 210

🎬SERIAL🎬

TERMIN: 20-27 lipca 2026

Do produkcji wyjazdowej serialu poszukujemy do ról:

Ojciec: (40-50 lat) 

Klasyczny Pan z brzuszkiem, ciepły i opiekuńczy 

stawka 1500 zł

Syn: (18-24 lata) 

Ułożony młody dorosły, zacięty sportowiec z charakterem.

stawka 2500 zł

Córka (18-24 lata) 

Zbuntowana nastolatka/młoda dorosła, żyjąca na swoich własnych zasadach, niezależna.

stawka 3000 zł

Stawki netto - UoD - Zapewniamy przelot, hotel wraz z pełnym wyżywieniem oraz czas wolny (1 cały dzień + każdego dnia po zdjęciach).

Zgłoszenia zatytułowane "SERIAL TOSKANIA LIPIEC - ROLA" na adres: klementynasip@gmail.com lub w wiadomości prywatnej zawierające informacje o doświadczeniu i zdjęcia - twarz + sylwetka.

Na wybrane zgłoszenia odpowiemy do końca czerwca.

items.title: 🎬SERIAL🎬

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Szukam profesjonalnych aktorek i aktorów. Casting do 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie! 
4 role, fajne stawki.  Więcej informacji o tym, jak się zgłosić, gdzie i do kogo, na samym dole.

1. Paweł Brodzki (45) – Prawnik, schludny i przystojny, nosi garnitury. Typ atrakcyjnego faceta w średnim wieku - głowy rodziny. Ma romans z Tatianą. (3, 6, 7, 8, 10, 20, 21, 23, 24)AKTOR

Termin: 3 dni 30.06, 01.07 i 04.07

Stawka: 2100zł na rękę 

2. Ewa Brodzka (45) – Prawniczka, żona Pawła, zadbana i strojąca się - wiarygodna “żona Wilanowa”. Traktuje innych z wyższością (3, 5, 6, 7, 10, 11, 20, 21, 23, 24) AKTORKA – PRAWO JAZDY

Termin:  2 dni 30.06 i 01.07

Stawka: 1400zł na rękę

3. Tosia Brodzka (18) – wygląd “zwykłej dziewczyny” - która niczym się nie wyróżnia, uczennica dobrej szkoły z mundurkami, zabójczyni Tatiany (7, 10, 11, 23, 24) SPEC.

Termin: 2 dni 30.06 i 01.07

Stawka: 1200zł na rękę 

4. Robert Gawek (35) – Wspólnik zamordowanej gosposi, oszust notowany za oszustwa, nie jest typowym zbirem-mięśniakiem, raczej chudym, żylastym o aparycji cwaniaka który siedzi przy kompie, ale też niekoniecznie - (1, 16A, 18, 19) SPEC.

Termin: 2 dni: 01.07 i 04.07

Stawka: 1200zł na rękę

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:
* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube
* aktualne zdjęcie
* wiek, wzrost, wagę
* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 
* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Jeżeli ktoś nie ma żadnych materiałów, to proszę o informację w mailu. Podeślę wybranym osobom scenkę do nagrania.

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎one or more people and ‎text that says '‎nar GLINIARZE LINIARZE محي‎'‎‎

items.text:
PAID CASTING CALL – NON-UNION

House of Talent is seeking college-age students and young adults (18+) for a paid focus group research study.

• Date: June 29
• Rate: $350 for 10 hours
• Location: Wayne, NJ

NYC shuttle transportation is available, or participants may self-report if local to New Jersey.

If this sounds like you, apply today. If not, please share with friends, classmates, or anyone who may be a good fit.

[https://tinyurl.com/focusgroupnj](https://tinyurl.com/focusgroupnj)

items.text:
Hello! I am a creative portrait photographer booking in the Los Angeles area for August 2026. If you are in need of headshots or any other photo work, I'd love to get in touch. I enjoy being creative and bringing out not only the subject's beauty, but their spirit!

You can find more of my work at www.mariellebosco.com or instagram.com/mariellebosco and can reach out via DM or email bosco.marielle@gmail.com. If you have any questions or want to discuss an idea, don't hesitate to comment or reach out! I look forward to working with you.

items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ASHES FEATURE FILM M CASTING CALL MOST ROLES HAVE BEN CAST. NOW SEEKING: SEEKING CAMILLE REYES LEAD WOMAN, 30s ALL ETHNICITIES TO SUBMIT ENCOURAGED CARRIES 90+ PAGES OF THE FILM. ATLANTA, ATLANTA,G GA NON-UNION PAID ($300+/DAY) ($300+ SUBMIT: S.JOHNSONSTUDIOSATLOGMAIL.COM'

items.text: Monday 29th - New Routine - Start for just £3

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
JERRY VALENTINO WRIGHT

Author | Publisher | Storyteller

From Texas to the world, Jerry Valentino Wright is a bold new voice in literature— writing stories that are raw, cinematic, emotional, and unforgettable. His books don't just entertain; they speak to the soul, challenge the heart, and leave readers changed.
Blending real-life struggle, love, faith, resilience, and redemption, Jerry's work connects deeply with readers who know what it means to survive, to hope, and to rise.
This isn't hype.
This is a movement.
And you're witnessing the beginning.

In 2017… my life changed.
I was sentenced to 10 years in prison.

Not because I didn't make mistakes…
but because the game I was in was designed for somebody to fall.

I walked into a situation that was already decided before I even knew I was in it.
And when those doors closed behind me…
it felt like everything was gone.

But here's the truth—
your situation is real… but it is not final.

I made a decision:
If I was going to be in a cell… my mind was going to be free.
And step by step, I rebuilt a man the world thought was finished.

I came home early. 2019.

Now?

I'm a Licensed Insurance Broker.
A Claims Adjuster.
A Business Owner.
An Author. A Publisher.
This isn't hype.
This is a movement.
And you're witnessing the beginning.

Click the link 
👇🏾👇🏾👇🏾👇🏾

https://v0-author-website-design-lime.vercel.app/

❗️WARSZAWA, 5, 6, 8, 10 LIPCA❗️

Zdjęcia będą realizowane w Warszawie w dniach 15-19  Lipca na zgłoszenia czekamy JUŻ DZIŚ (termin zgłoszeń do 30 Czerwca) 
Rodziców dzieci z AKTUALNYMI ZGODAMI  PIP zapraszamy do zgłoszeń poprzez wiadomość 
e-mail na adres: statysci@profesjatv.pl  w temacie wiadomości wpisujemy: DZIECI 

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
•Imię i nazwisko dziecka
• telefon kontaktowy do opiekuna 
• wizytówka z linkiem do YouTube lub Vimeo (nie wysyłamy wizytówki z załączniku wiadomości jako plik video TYLKO I WYŁĄCZNIE LINK do YouTube lub Vimeo) 

Odezwiemy się do wybranych Osób 

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń Osoby z Warszawy i okolic, nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu czy noclegu 

Pozdrawiamy 🙂 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych RODO dla PROFESJA TV

Do nowego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Piotr Szewczyk (31) – Wyszedł z więzienia, specjalizuje się w okradaniu domów. 
DATA: 30.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Paweł Szewczyk (29) –  Drugi z braci przestępców, mieszkających w przyczepie. Ten mniej narwany.
DATA: 30.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Pracownik (43) – pracownik fizyczny w zakładzie metalurgicznym. 
DATA: 29.06
STAWKA: 300 ZŁ NETTO

- Bąk (40) – Właściciel psa, który wścieka się podczas interwencji TOZu. 
DATA: 29.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Lokalny Mundurowy (43) – Pomaga detektywom, poczciwy 
DATA: 30.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
🎭 FROM UNKNOWN TO TWO NETFLIX SERIES: HERE’S HOW
Hey there, my name is Freya Tingley 👋😃

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two NETFLIX series and LEAD roles in six feature films. I starred in JERSEY BOYS, directed by CLINT EASTWOOD, worked alongside JEAN-CLAUDE VAN DAMME, and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started acting when I was 14 and went from having no industry connections to signing with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood at 17, moving to LA at 18, and booking a series regular role on a NETFLIX show within three months of arriving.

Some call it luck. But it was STRATEGY.

Recently, I’ve connected with HUNDREDS OF ACTORS from all over the world, and one thing keeps coming up:

ACTORS WHO FEEL STUCK AND DON’T KNOW WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT.

Which is exactly why I created this.

A private, one-to-one CAREER MENTORSHIP SESSION over Zoom.

Together, we’ll cover:

• The ONE SKILL every actor must have to consistently book work (hint: it’s not talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right REPRESENTATION
• What to focus on if you don’t have an AGENT, and how to actively work towards getting one
• What to do if your AGENT isn’t sending you AUDITIONS
• What to do if you’re auditioning regularly but not BOOKING (the key most actors miss)
• The MATERIALS you actually need, and what most actors get wrong
• How to stop waiting for opportunities and start strategically creating them for yourself
• Plus much more

You’ll leave with the EXACT STRATEGY to transform your career. The same strategy I used to go from UNKNOWN to WORKING ACTOR.

If you’re committed to becoming a WORKING ACTOR:

1. Comment “MENTORSHIP” below and tell me what you most need help with
2. Send me a direct message

I only have a handful of spots left this month.

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m glad to be part of this community and connect with like-minded individuals building and growing in different ways.

I help people in two key areas:

✨ Credit Consulting — guiding you on how to understand, improve, and properly structure your credit so you can qualify for things like homes, cars, and business funding

📸 California-Based Photography — I also manage and offer creative photography services for branding, events, and content, helping you show up professionally and confidently

I’ve seen how important it is to have both your financial foundation and your personal/brand presence aligned—especially if you’re working toward bigger goals.

If you’re looking to improve your credit or need high-quality visuals for your brand or life moments, feel free to connect 🤍

Comment “INFO” or send me a message!

🎬 Agencja Skyfilm poszukuje statystów do serialu „Zegar czasu” produkowanego przez Telewizję Polską.

👥 Kobiety i mężczyźni w wieku 17–65 lat do roli tłumu pod urzędem.

🔗 Link do zgłoszenia – Mężczyźni
https://casting-app.pl/apply/5cac581e66144e8984afbd1f8195e38f

🔗 Link do zgłoszenia – Kobiety
https://casting-app.pl/apply/bb9bc35a71574fd59c2cde9c70e53aa7

📍 Termin zdjęć: 29 czerwca
📍 Miejsce: Grójec (wyjazd z Warszawy transportem produkcyjnym o godz. 6:00)
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne
💰 Stawka: 130 zł za dzień zdjęciowy (płatne gotówką po planie)

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń! 🎥

items.text:
🎬 Poszukiwany samochód do etiudy filmowej! 🚖
Do etiudy reżyserskiej Szkoły Filmowej w Katowicach poszukujemy samochodu Toyota Corolla lub podobnego modelu, który w filmie będzie pełnił rolę taksówki.

📅 Termin zdjęć: 7–8 lipca

📍 Miejsce realizacji: Katowice

🚗 Najważniejsze wymaganie: samochód powinien być szary lub ciemnoszary.

Samochód potrzebny będzie na dwa dni zdjęciowe. Zapewniamy zwrot kosztów paliwa, a pozostałe szczegóły współpracy chętnie omówimy indywidualnie.

Jeśli ktoś posiada takie auto lub zna kogoś, kto mógłby pomóc — będziemy ogromnie wdzięczni za kontakt!

📩 Proszę o wiadomość prywatną lub kontakt mailowy: zuzanna.zymelka@gmail.com

topComments.text: Napisałem priv

items.text:
👥📸 **Szukamy mężczyzn i kobiet do fajnej kampanii we Wrocławiu!**

Hej! Szukam **amatorów** (nie potrzebujesz doświadczenia!) do udziału w kampanii dla jednej z wrocławskich firm usługowych.

Będziemy robić zdjęcia i nagrywać krótkie rolki na social media. 🎬📸

**Kogo szukamy?**
👨‍🦱👩‍🦰 Mężczyzn i kobiet w wieku 35–50
📍 Najlepiej z Wrocławia (tu nagrywamy!)

**Kiedy?**
📆 01.07 i 02.07 — potrzebna dostępność w oba dni

 **Stawka?**
🤝 Do dogadania!

📩 Zainteresowany? Odezwij się na priv!
✨ Może to właśnie Ciebie szukamy!

topComments.text: Zainteresowana

items.text:
Casting Call for Left Out! We're looking for one of our main characters: Millie!

Send us your headshot and demo (optional) if interested in playing any of these characters, and we will send sides. 

Accepting video submissions only. 

Email: leftout.series@gmail.com

Video Submission Deadline: June 19

Shooting Date: 27-28 June

Shooting Location: Downtown Toronto

topComments.text: Just applied! This seems like a super cool concept :)

items.text:
🎬‼️CASTING CALL ‼️🎬
We are looking for experienced jet ski driver who can film high-quality video content on a freelance/outsourced basis for one of our projects.

Preferred locations include Greece, Bali, Thailand, Spain, and other sunny coastal destinations with beautiful ocean scenery.

If you have access to a jet ski, experience with filming, and can capture dynamic, high-quality footage, we'd love to hear from you.

💸Paid

📩 dm me for more details

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of jet ski, boat and text

items.text:
# **CASTING** **CALL** — Girls' Night Out Short Film **SUPPORTING & BG**

A cinematic short film about five Black women navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC.
We are currently casting Supporting Roles and Background Performers. Seeking performers from all experience levels.

SUPPORTING ROLES 
GLADYS: 40s–60s, White Female, Office colleague
COLLEAGUE #1: Late 20s–30s, White Female, Office colleague
LISA: Late 20s–40s, Female, Open Ethnicity, Possibly Voice Over, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #2: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #3: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
OLDER MAN: 60+, Male, Open Ethnicity, Apartment neighbour, One-liner

BACKGROUND PERFORMERS To authentically reflect the cultural richness & diversity of Vancouver, we especially encourage submissions from Indigenous, Black, Latino, East Asian, South Asian, Southeast Asian, Middle Eastern, Mixed-Race, and White performers. All ethnicities, backgrounds, body types, abilities, and experience levels are welcome to submit.

• Restaurant Attendees
• Office Background
• Coat Check Staff
• Main Server #1 & Server #2
• Street Pedestrians
• Train Passengers

SHOOT DATES
August 21–24, 2026
Vancouver, BC
VOLUNTEER / IN-KIND PRODUCTION
Participants will receive: Screen Credit, Professional BTS Stills, Reel/Portfolio Material, Film Copy Upon Completion, Priority on Next Paid, Project, Targeting Festival Submission

TO SUBMIT
Email: **gnothefilm@gmail.com** (FULL NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION, UNION STATUS, HEADSHOT, RESUME / REEL (if available), ROLE OF INTEREST & AVAILABILITY

"Five Black women. One Friday. Everything unsaid."
[#VancouverCasting](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouvercasting?__tn__=*NK*F) [#VancouverActors](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouveractors?__tn__=*NK*F) [#CastingCall](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/castingcall?__tn__=*NK*F) [#BackgroundPerformers](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/backgroundperformers?__tn__=*NK*F) [#SupportingRoles](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/supportingroles?__tn__=*NK*F) [#WomenInFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/womeninfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#IndependentFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/independentfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#BIPOCArtists](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/bipocartists?__tn__=*NK*F) [#VancouverFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouverfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#GirlsNightOutFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/girlsnightoutfilm?__tn__=*NK*F)

**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy short film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. Audition submission deadline- 27th March.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

Vijay's Date- 28-38, Any ethnicity, large-bodied/curvy, shoot on 11th July. 

Lady in Bar- 22-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th July. 2-3 lines 

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 5 women and 5 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on either 11th or 12th July.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown 

**Date:** 11th and 12th July, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

items.text:
**THE SESSION - VFS STUDENT FILM - NON-UNION** 

Hello, I am Anastasia and I am the Line Producer for “The Session,” a student short film with Vancouver Film School. 

The premise is Niri, a psychologically fractured taxi driver under the investigation of murder, undergoes psychiatric sessions that loosens his grip on reality as he gets flashbacks - blood spreading on the floor and his father’s abuse. He sees himself killing his psychiatrist, Dr. Orms, with the very pen she is using during their session. However, she hands him a diagnosis and says he’s free to go, ending the session calmly. As he exits, Detective Fareth greets him like an old friend, yet now Niri is wearing a completely different outfit with the paper in his hand being blank - revealing that he was never free, but a psychiatric patient all along.

We are accepting submissions for all of the following roles:

**NIRI**
Male, 25-35 y.o., All ethnicities
A man misdiagnosed with schizophrenia actually suffers from DID-- two distinct identities split from his trauma: his gentle, vulnerable self and an alter driven by anger and pain. Subtle clues like memory loss, disconnection, and a history of trauma are woven into him. Deep down Niri knows the truth, but paralyzed by guilt and fear of losing control entirely, he hides it from everyone aware that whoever finds out could become the next victim.

**DR. ORMS**
Female, 40-55 y.o., All ethnicities
Dr. Katerin Orms is a calm, maternal psychiatrist who represents the last remnant of Niri's sanity, confident she can cure him. Her expertise becomes her downfall; she diagnoses him with schizophrenia but fails to see the truth he's hiding. Ironically in her case, the most experienced person in the room is the one most blind to what's really happening.

**DETECTIVE FARETH**
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
A lifetime of catching criminals has left Fareth with little patience and no apologies. He operates outside the law not out of malice, but because he knows pressure works. Decades of experience haven't slowed him down; they've just made him colder, sharper, and harder to argue with.

**THE SUSPECT**
Male, 20-30 y.o., All ethnicities
The suspect is nobody, a random guy brought into custody (not entirely legally) by the detective Fareth to answer some questions. Little did the suspect know, is that the detective just made him his twisted objective. The suspect is terrified and very easy to read. From what we hear it seems that it wasn’t his first time in custody, but we could easily deduce that he didn’t want to stay there for long-- this is why he’s agitated and afraid.

**NIRI’S FATHER **
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
Though there is no dialogue for this character, The father of Niri was a closed minded man, with an old and retrograde worldview, he served and experienced the second world war as commander, but lost all his glory and respect at the end of it. He was brainwashed with a military mindset and had PTSD. He was violent, unpredictable and angry, so he unloaded all his frustration and what he considered injustice on his innocent son

We are accepting actors from the greater Vancouver area, which is also where we will be filming.

**IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN ONE OF THESE ROLES**, please send your name, a headshot, a resume, a demo reel, and the role you are auditioning for to ***sessionwdr.o@gmail.com***. Please send by **Wednesday, June 24th, 09:00AM**. 

Chosen actors will then be requested self tapes on Wednesday, June 24th, which will be sent to the production email with more instructions in the initial request. Self tapes are due and callback requests are sent out Friday, June 26th. In-person callbacks will be held on Sunday, June 28th. **We will be shooting July 15th to July 17th. **

This is a Non-Union, Non-paid 10 minute film shot across 3 days. On set meals are fully covered. IMDB Credits provided. We will release the film online and will screen the film to applied festivals.

Angela Boehm Casting is now casting for a commercial that is filming in the Cleveland, OH area TWO DAYS from July 29th - 30th.
**IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a two day shoot, talent will need to be available for BOTH DAYS.**

DETAILS:
- Project: 'Alpha Aromatics' Commercial
- Filming Location: Cleveland, OH Area (Likely West Side or Lakefront)
- Shoot Date(s): 7/29 & 7/30 (Talent will work BOTH DAYS)
- Rate: $1000 plus 20% per day, guarantee 2 days.
- Usage: Web, social (TikTok, Instagram), and Amazon listings. Full buyout. Lifestyle how-to and product videos, plus stills, for two diffusers

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

OLDER WOMAN:
- Age: 60's-70's
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: ANY

YOUNG ADULT:
- Age: 20-35
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: Hispanic/LatinX

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:
In order to submit for this project, you will need to film a self-tape reading the from sides linked below. Please send your video to team@angelaboehmcasting.com. 

SUBJECT LINE: "Alpha Aromatics Submission - YOUR NAME"

Audition Directions:
- Please do not tape outside
- Please have a blank background
- Please put slates at the end of the audition.
- Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!
- DEADLINE: EOD Friday, 6.26

CLICK HERE FOR THE AUDITION SIDES: https://bit.ly/ABCAASides

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

Hello!

We are still casting FEMALE IDENTIFYING ACTORS (40s-60s) who are LOCAL to EAU CLAIRE, WI for a non-union feature shooting this fall entitled **Missing Cody**. *Please only submit if you fit this criteria.*

**Logline: **After the unexpected passing of her parents, a runaway is forced back to her childhood home, reuniting with her estranged siblings to pay off their parents’ debts.

**MISS GENEVIEVE LACORTE (40s-60s, F) FEATURED**

The neighborhood mom - you know the type that makes casseroles for her neighbors. A sweet, material figure who helps Margot through troubles.

If you are interested, please contact missingcodycasting@gmail.com with a headshot, and we will be in touch if we would like to see you!

**MISS GENEVIEVE LACORTE (40s-60s, F) FEATURED**

The neighborhood mom - you know the type that makes casseroles for her neighbors. A sweet, material figure who helps Margot through troubles.

If you are interested, please contact missingcodycasting@gmail.com with a headshot, and we will be in touch if we would like to see you!

items.text:
Urgently seeking a male-identifying actor for "Cryptophasia"! If interested, please contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com asap!

All details at: [[https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions)](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExV3RXeUh4bEozcTA4WGZEMnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wuYcyKwdVXjka-8n85mtcPepsYDaVlZl5AhJEWK7jZmcpT2zQ4DYs9KYpIg_aem_JXKrh2NpoDhdGHQn3VfNXw)

**Dates:**

Rehearsals will be held June 30th through July 18th on select weekdays and Saturdays.  Rehearsal schedule is flexible for this role.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances: **July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

Compensation: $100 stipend plus portion of profits

**Show Synopsis:**

Cryptophasia (N)- The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Description:**

Unk/Dr. Truman (Male-identifying, 18+ to play 30s-60s)- Actor will double as Missy's goofy, somewhat oblivious father and Anna and Bella's caring but emotionally guarded pediatrician.

items.text:
🎬🎬🎬Casting do Programu TV realizowanego dla jednej z dziecięcych stacji telewizyjnych 
Poszukujemy Dzieci w wieku 5-8 lat - (z doświadczeniem telewizyjnym) komunikujących się w języku angielskim 🎬🎬🎬

Zdjęcia będą realizowane w Warszawie w dniach 15-19  Lipca na zgłoszenia czekamy JUŻ DZIŚ (termin zgłoszeń do 30 Czerwca) 
Rodziców dzieci z AKTUALNYMI ZGODAMI  PIP zapraszamy do zgłoszeń poprzez wiadomość 
e-mail na adres: statysci@profesjatv.pl  w temacie wiadomości wpisujemy: DZIECI 

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
•Imię i nazwisko dziecka
• telefon kontaktowy do opiekuna 
• wizytówka z linkiem do YouTube lub Vimeo (nie wysyłamy wizytówki z załączniku wiadomości jako plik video TYLKO I WYŁĄCZNIE LINK do YouTube lub Vimeo) 

Odezwiemy się do wybranych Osób 

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń Osoby z Warszawy i okolic, nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu czy noclegu 

Pozdrawiamy 🙂 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych RODO dla PROFESJA TV

items.text:
Do nowego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Piotr Szewczyk (31) – Wyszedł z więzienia, specjalizuje się w okradaniu domów. 
DATA: 30.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Paweł Szewczyk (29) –  Drugi z braci przestępców, mieszkających w przyczepie. Ten mniej narwany.
DATA: 30.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Pracownik (43) – pracownik fizyczny w zakładzie metalurgicznym. 
DATA: 29.06
STAWKA: 300 ZŁ NETTO

- Bąk (40) – Właściciel psa, który wścieka się podczas interwencji TOZu. 
DATA: 29.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Lokalny Mundurowy (43) – Pomaga detektywom, poczciwy 
DATA: 30.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
LADBible Casting!

I'm looking for genuine, die-hard football fans aged 18+ with a strong story to back why. Examples such as running a community football group, or events, maybe you missed a special lifetime event to attend a match, couples who have attended matches together for over 40+ years etc. All unique stories welcome. These are for shoots taking place in London, Manchester, Liverpool and Birmingham throughout June and each participant will receive a fee of £2000 for participation. For more information please email erica.stein@ladbiblegroup.com

items.text:
Hello, I am looking to get a meeting with a producer or agent to talk about my cartoon. I am in Long Beach, CA. It is called Captain Bong Water. It's about super hero alien bongs trying to save mother nature in hilarious stoned ways, I have a lot of characters created already and about 16 pages of backstory/script. Also have some shirts made for it as well. The cartoon actually got me put on a cannabis reality tv show for 420. I have been working on the cartoon for 2 years now. I have a shirt design for each character so far and it has their names on them.
Here is some of the story to give you an idea of the show. 

The alien bongs come from a planet called Herbzellia420. It is ruled by The Zen Council ( the heroes of the story) and on their home planet they live in a giant cannabis bud called The Nugg Fortress of Good Vibes. The main villain is The Evil Broken Dr. Bong who enslaved the planet of Pillseedia (the Zen Council had imprisoned him there for trying to steal all the cannabis for himself and enslave everybody and get them zombied out on pills) In the beginning of the story Dr. Bong sends the planet of pillseedia into their home planet Herbzellia420 and destroys them both in a giant explosion , sending parts of the planets carrying the people from them all across the universe with a great deal of them going towards earth. This happens right before the dinosaurs on earth so you see them throughout time in cave paintings and artwork throughout time.

https://www.instagram.com/captainbongwaterofficial?igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==

items.groupTitle: LA Actors, Agents, Casting Directors, Producers
items.summary:
Hello, I am looking to get a meeting with a producer or agent to talk about my cartoon. I am in Long Beach, CA. It is called Captain Bong Water. It's about super hero alien bongs trying to save mother nature in hilarious stoned ways, I have a lot of characters created already and about 16 pages of backstory/script. Also have some shirts made for it as well. The cartoon actually got me put on a cannabis reality tv show for 420. I have been working on the cartoon for 2 years now. I have a shirt design for each character so far and it has their names on them.
Here is some of the story to give you an idea of the show. 

The alien bongs come from a planet called Herbzellia420. It is ruled by The Zen Council ( the heroes of the story) and on their home planet they live in a giant cannabis bud called The Nugg Fortress of Good Vibes. The main villain is The Evil Broken Dr. Bong who enslaved the planet of Pillseedia (the Zen Council had imprisoned him there for trying to steal all the cannabis for himself and enslave everybody and get them zombied out on pills) In the beginning of the story Dr. Bong sends the planet of pillseedia into their home planet Herbzellia420 and destroys them both in a giant explosion , sending parts of the planets carrying the people from them all across the universe with a great deal of them going towards earth. This happens right before the dinosaurs on earth so you see them throughout time in cave paintings and artwork throughout time.

https://www.instagram.com/captainbongwaterofficial?igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – "Million Dollar Personality Girl/Boy" (Short Film) 🎬
We are seeking a talented actor with exceptional range for an upcoming artistic short film, "Million Dollar Personality Boy / Girl" (MDPG), set in 1930s Hollywood and scheduled to film this summer.

Role:

BILL "BOJANGLES" ROBINSON

Male/Female African American, Ages 30–60

A legendary tap dancer whose remarkable success cannot shield him from the racial prejudices of the era.

Project Concept:

The film features a brief but powerful conversation between Bill "Bojangles" Robinson and Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major Hollywood studio. Together, they discuss the challenges and triumphs of Black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood.

Production Details:

Genre: Drama

Location: in process 

Shoot Dates: Two-day weekend shoot, July 2026 (Exact dates TBD)

One filming location

Compensation: $750 flat rate

IMDb Credit, Meal, and Reel Footage Included

Preferred Qualifications:

Tap dancing experience is a plus (very light choreography required)

Strong acting ability is the primary focus

This is a unique opportunity to portray an iconic figure in Black entertainment history and showcase your talent in a meaningful and memorable role.

To Submit:

Please send your headshot, resume, and reel to:

SteaDr7@gmail.com

Subject Line: BILL SUBMISSION

Questions, recommendations, and referrals are always appreciated.

We look forward to hearing from you! 🎥✨

items.text:
Marc Graue is one of the most respected names in the voice over industry, combining decades of professional experience as a voice actor, coach, director, and legendary demo producer. Having worked with thousands of voice actors—from beginners to established professionals—Marc has helped shape successful careers across animation, video games, commercials, promos, audiobooks, and narration.
As the founder of Marc Graue Voice Over Studios, Marc provides world-class voice over coaching, personalized career guidance, professional demo production, audition training, and performance direction. His coaching focuses on helping talent discover their authentic voice, sharpen their acting skills, master today's competitive marketplace, and develop the confidence needed to book more work.
What You'll Get
When you work with Marc Graue, you receive far more than coaching—you gain a trusted mentor with decades of real-world industry experience. You'll learn how to create compelling performances, develop memorable characters, improve audition skills, understand industry expectations, and position yourself for long-term success. Whether you're pursuing commercials, animation, video games, audiobooks, or narration, Marc provides honest feedback, practical strategies, and personalized guidance designed to help you stand out.
Why Marc Graue
Marc's reputation has been built on results. His students and clients have gone on to book major projects, secure top agency representation, and build thriving voice over careers. Through expert coaching, legendary demo production, and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Marc helps voice actors transform talent into opportunity and potential into success.

items.text:
Now casting
Casting a 3-4 year old girl actress for one short scene no dialogue walking in a park. This is a student / indie film- NO PAY but actors will receive IMDb and screen credits. Looking for preferably blonde or lighter tone hair and either hazel or green eyes if possible. Mainly looking for a sweet face with big eyes and cute personality.

WHERE: FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES / SAN FERNANDO VALLEY AREA.

WHAT: One short scene (the ending of the movie) a little girl and a grandpa in a grass field holding hands walking in the sunset.

SYNOPSIS:

“Unforgettable” is a story about hope, courage and the determination of one woman’s journey of the impossible. Through this true story, we learn how one-woman refusal to give up a dream would allow her to receive unusual confirmations from beyond and how a loving song showed her signs of hope along the way. A true story of synchronicity and love between a grandfather and a very special song.

If you know someone who would fit this role please DM me! Looking to film sometime between now and August.

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: East London

If fate handed you an inventory slot, what would you grab? A prop sword, a healing potion, or studio lights to bathe you mates?

This October, JDG presents a charity spectacular built around Master Jonjon's inventive new play: "Game Fillet Game: A Dive into Influencing Careers… Uninvented Jobs… Surprise Missions…". Find out what the story's about: cutt.ly/GFGstory

But here's the glorious part: you can be in it. Sign up: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

Starting early July, we're throwing open the doors to free masterclass workshop rehearsals. Whether you're a seasoned pro or trying something new, you belong here. Wander between departments, crash other people's workshops, build your showreel, learn something new, and meet other drama enthusiasts.

Backstage and cast roles are open. We're hunting for:
Director
Assistant Director
Stage Manager
Assistant Stage Manager
Designer
Sound Designer
Multimedia Designer
Multimedia Operator
Lighting Designer
Lighting Tech
Costume Designer
Props Designer
Set Designer
Front of House Manager
Assistant Front of House Manager
Director of Photography (Photography & Video Recording)

Sign up for your audition: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

The spotlight's on. Let the magic begin.

.

.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)
A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role 

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI 

Male | Playing Age 16–18

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a coming-of-age mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

• Headshot

• Recent photos

• Age and city where you based now

• Acting experience (if any)

• Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

items.text:
NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? Gotowanie to Twoja pasja?

Szukamy uczestników do nowego programu kulinarnego. Mile widziane są osoby, które po raz pierwszy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerami.

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody!

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a opowiem o szczegółach.

Zuza

Tworzymy przestrzeń dla dzieci, młodzieży i dorosłych, którzy realizują swoją pasję. 

Bezpieczeństwo to nasz priorytet. 🔐
W naszej bazie aktorów zdjęcia i profile  podopiecznych nie są dostępne dla każdego w sieci. Dostęp do bazy mają wyłącznie zweryfikowani reżyserzy i twórcy projektów. Twoja (lub Twojego dziecka) prywatność jest u nas w 100% bezpieczna.
Chcesz spróbować swoich sił w reklamie, filmie, serialu w profesjonalnych warunkach? Zapraszamy do naszej agencji!

sharedPost.text:
You’ve seen the art everywhere… but have you ever experienced the show live? ✨
This year is especially meaningful for Shen Yun. For the first time ever, the Toronto performances at the Four Seasons Centre were unexpectedly cancelled due to a false bomb threat. But now, Shen Yun is returning this June — stronger than ever. 💛
If you missed it before, this is your chance to finally witness the performance everyone talks about. 🌸
🎶Every year is a new experience with this superb show. 
🌟 Let's start with the beautiful things.
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/gdoNLl for information on theaters near you.
