items.text: Entertainment Hosts… Don’t miss your opportunity!!!

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL: ENTERTAINMENT HOSTS for Disney Cruise Line!

We are 'excellent recruitment' an official hiring agency for Disney Cruise Line.

We're holding exclusive, closed auditions in London for Entertainment Hosts to join the magic at sea✨

Do you have the energy, charisma, and stage presence to bring Disney entertainment to life at sea?
This is your chance to shine — and be part of something truly extraordinary.

We are seeking individuals with a minimum of two years experience in a hosting, stage, or public speaking role.

📍 Location: Central London
📅 Auditions: By invitation only
🎭 Apply now for a first-stage audition via the link below.

👉 https://excellentrecruitment.biz/oppo.../entertainment-host/

Applications must be submitted in advance to be considered. No walk-ins will be accepted.

Set sail on the adventure of a lifetime — we can't wait to see what you bring to the stage!

#disney #crewlife #travel #DCL #careeratsea #disneycastmember #disneygram #disneycruise #disneylife #shiplife #travelling #cruise #cruiselife #disneyfamily #lifeatsea #disney #followus #cruisejob #disneyjobs #cruisework #entertainment #audition #casting #entertainmenthost #LondonAuditions

items.text:
**PAID OPPORTUNITY FOR ARABIC-SPEAKING PERFORMERS**

Requirements:

- Applicants must be 18+ years of age.
- Knowledge of Arabic pronunciation.
- Prior stage or performing experience.
- Full availability between 21 September and 28 September (performance dates).
- Availability between 17 September and 21 September (times TBD) for rehearsals with the artist prior to the performance.

The performance is presented and produced by A/POLITICAL and co-curated with Maricel Alvarez.

Interested candidates are invited to complete the form in our bio by **30 June**. Link in bio.

**Apply here:** https://forms.gle/VHNsei3i2UBpZtpu9

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'OPEN CALL FOR PERFORMERS Ap A/POLITICAL is seeking Arabic speaking performers and individuals across the gender spectrum to participate in an upcoming durational spoken-word performance in London by an established artist. The work will draw attention to the ongoing genocide of the Palestinian people andisin partnership with the Palestinian Research Centre. PERFORMANCE DETAILS: -The performance will begin on September 21st, 2026, at 6PM GMT. -It will continue 24 hours a day, 7 7days a week for approximately 5-10 days with performers working in shifts. More info below.'

items.text:
Looking for 2 cast members please to fly to a Destination in Italy for a You Tube Video shoot 

Fly out 1st July

shoot date 2nd July

fly back 3rd July

1st role , Female playing age of 23 to 35  to play the role of a dizzy essex girl who hosts a zumba class but very badly within the role 

2nd role

Male aged between 22 to 35 to play the role of a cheesy Bad holiday rep style character would suit either someone with a good essex accent proper geeza style or someone very English and camp and Loud full of energy 

These roles would suit someone with a good comedic Ad lib skill set to them as its mostly unscripted and improv style and the roles need to be played comically 

fees £600.00 each plus all flights and expenses paid 

please comment below if either role suits you with either a link to your spotlight or video showreel 

thankyou

Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be holding Summer Open Casting Calls for Non-Union Actors with Acting Experience, Resumes, Headshots and Reels in New England for PAID Commercial work!

Seeking a Diverse Cast of Characters to represent who we are as Americans to portray Medical Professionals and Patients!

I have cast 90 Actors in 9 PSA Commercials and will be doing more this Summer and Fall!!

For details on the Casting Calls please send an email to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subj: Non-Union Open Calls 2026

Check out Bill Wood, Cameron Krauth and Juri Love in one of the spots!!

https://www.facebook.com/share/r/17kK4RbiLa/?mibextid=wwXIfr

items.summary:
Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be holding Summer Open Casting Calls for Non-Union Actors with Acting Experience, Resumes, Headshots and Reels in New England for PAID Commercial work!

Seeking a Diverse Cast of Characters to represent who we are as Americans to portray Medical Professionals and Patients!

I have cast 90 Actors in 9 PSA Commercials and will be doing more this Summer and Fall!!

For details on the Casting Calls please send an email to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subj: Non-Union Open Calls 2026

Check out Bill Wood, Cameron Krauth and Juri Love in one of the spots!!

https://www.facebook.com/share/r/17kK4RbiLa/?mibextid=wwXIfr

items.text:
Jetzt schon auf die Sommerferien freuen!
🍉👓🧴🍦☀️🏝️

Mit ClarAct geht das 🌈☺️☺️

🐝Komm mit uns auf die Bühne und spiele deine Traumrolle!-🎭🧚🏻‍♀️🐼👮👑🏴‍☠️

Du hast Lust auf der Bühne zu stehen und deine eigene Geschichte zu schreiben und zu spielen? 

Dann bist du in unserem Schauspielworkshop in den Hamburger Sommerferien 2026 genau richtig ☺️🥳

Am Ende werden wir unser eigenes Stück mit Kostüm und allem Drum und Dran vor deinen Gästen auf unserer coolen Bühne präsentieren! 🎬🎭🕴️

Sei dabei und melde dich jetzt an und profitiere von unserem early bird Rabatt!🐥

📍 Ort: Hamburg Hafencity
📅 Termin: 27. und 28. Juli 2026 
  jeweils 10-13 Uhr 
🐥Jetzt mit Rabatt: 129,00€ statt 149,00€

👉 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: Link in der Bio
  www.claract.de

🚨 Die Plätze sind begrenzt – melde dich am besten direkt an!
Geeignet für Kinder von 5-12 Jahren

Bei Fragen melde dich jederzeit bei mir!😊
Ich freue mich auf dich 🥳

Mit ClarAct geht das 🌈☺️☺️

🐝Komm mit uns auf die Bühne und spiele deine Traumrolle!-🎭🧚🏻‍♀️🐼👮👑🏴‍☠️

Du hast Lust auf der Bühne zu stehen und deine eigene Geschichte zu schreiben und zu spielen? 

Dann bist du in unserem Schauspielworkshop in den Hamburger Sommerferien 2026 genau richtig ☺️🥳

Am Ende werden wir unser eigenes Stück mit Kostüm und allem Drum und Dran vor deinen Gästen auf unserer coolen Bühne präsentieren! 🎬🎭🕴️

Sei dabei und melde dich jetzt an und profitiere von unserem early bird Rabatt!🐥

📍 Ort: Hamburg Hafencity
📅 Termin: 27. und 28. Juli 2026 
  jeweils 10-13 Uhr 
🐥Jetzt mit Rabatt: 129,00€ statt 149,00€

👉 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: Link in der Bio
  www.claract.de

🚨 Die Plätze sind begrenzt – melde dich am besten direkt an!
Geeignet für Kinder von 5-12 Jahren

Bei Fragen melde dich jederzeit bei mir!😊
Ich freue mich auf dich 🥳

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — FREE ZONE**

We are looking for a **Persian-speaking woman** for a small voice-over role in FREE ZONE — a feature documentary about Exarcheia in Athens.

The role is **three sentences in Persian.** Recording can be done remotely on an iPhone — no studio, no professional equipment needed.

FREE ZONE is a DFFB Abschlussfilm, RBB Leuchtstoff funded, and dok.münchen pitch winner, heading for festival premieres!

If you're interested or know someone who might be — please message us or share. Every recommendation helps.

📩 [jasmine.alakari@gmail.com](mailto:jasmine.alakari@gmail.com)

items.text:
**CASTING SURREY-BASED SOCCER FAMILIES FOR TSN SPORTSCENTRE SEGMENT**

Hi all, I'm a producer working on behalf of Paper Route Studios ([https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries](https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries)), led by award-winning Executive Producer Corey Russell (credits include ***All or Nothing: Toronto Maple Leafs***).

We're currently casting **Surrey-based **soccer-loving families for a TSN SportsCentre segment tied to the opening of Western Canada’s first Jumpstart Community Soccer Pitch in Surrey. The piece will celebrate the impact of grassroots sport and the opportunities it creates for local families. 

We're looking to hear from families with an interesting personal connection to playing soccer - whether it has brought your family together, created opportunities, helped someone through a difficult time, or simply become an important part of your lives. If you have a soccer story you'd love to share, we'd love to hear from you!  

If this sounds like your family, please get in touch!

WhatsApp/text Adam at (647)562-0767 or email at [casting@thisispaperroute.com](mailto:casting@thisispaperroute.com) if interested. Thanks!

Thank you,

Adam

CASTING CALL – PAID COMMERCIAL SHOOT 🎬

Looking for a fit-looking Caucasian male, late 20s to mid-30s, for a non-speaking role in a restaurant commercial. The character is a gym-goer, so applicants should have an active, healthy appearance.

📍 Downtown Vancouver
📅 June 30, 2026
⏰ Early morning call time
💰 $100/hour
🕒 Approx. 2–3 hours of work

Please send a DM with a recent photo(s) and contact information if interested.

Thanks!

items.text:
Casting Call!
We’re casting one adult talent (ages 25–40, all are welcome) for a short non-speaking social media shoot focused on sleep wellness and CPAP use.

Talent will portray simple, natural bedtime and morning routines such as relaxing in bed, reading, and scrolling on a phone while wearing a CPAP mask. Looking for a relaxed, authentic on-camera presence.

📍 Surrey, BC

⏱ 3-hour shoot

💰 $250 CAD (non-union)

🎥 Social media content only (organic posts, not paid ads)

Must be comfortable on camera in sleepwear and with CPAP equipment (prop use).

To apply, please send a few recent photos and confirm availability to taylor@stilesproductions.com

topComments.text: Hi Taylor, just sent an email over but it bounced back. Would there be another email to use?
Available and emailed ☺️

Looking for a warm, natural actress/supporting artist to play the mum in a children’s music video for an 8-year-old artist.
Looking for a warm, natural actress/supporting artist to play the mum in a children’s music video for an 8-year-old artist.

Role: Mum / mother figure

Age range: 30–45

Shoot: London (Eltham), half day or full day

Date: 4th July 

Fee: Paid, please send your rate

Scene: Short family moment where mum reacts proudly to her son losing his first tooth / growing up fast

Look: Warm, natural, stylish, family-friendly

Requirements: Comfortable working around children, able to sign release form, previous screen experience preferred

Please DM with:

.Recent photo

.Short acting/showreel clip if available

.Location

.Availability

.Half-day/full-day rate

items.text: Hi Everyone! We are casting for an 11 minute proof of concept short. Filmed in North London July 18-20th. Please see role descriptions down below and email your headshot, showreel, and cv and or other relevant experience to the email posted below with the role you are applying for in the subject line.

items.text: Looking for a male model or actor to join me in the official music video for Dance Forever next week.🎶 No extensive experience needed — but good movement, handsome, and over 5’7. The role involves dancing in the chorus of a romantic, cinematic Latin music video. Please listen to the track before getting in touch 🎧 [https://open.spotify.com/track/0yzhzmDQ7CWECe7NLmsOVg?si=2P1KMwL2SS-jon2XtTcplQ] 💃🏽

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
📣 CASTING CALL — PAID UGC SHOOT (London)

We’re currently looking for female creators/models for upcoming UGC-style shoots for a maternity & baby care brand.

•Lifestyle / natural content  
•Relaxed filming style  
•No acting experience needed  
•Warm, natural vibe preferred  

Products include maternity & baby care items such as:
• Breast pumps  
• Belly bands  
• Baby strollers  
etc.

Please note:
You do NOT need to be a real mum for most shoots. The content is mainly lifestyle-based with simple everyday scenarios.

Location:
Central London / home-style shooting depending on project

Rates:
• Studio shoot: £35/hour  

Timing:
26-27 June

We’re especially looking for:
• Models with a warm, relaxed, natural vibe
• Mums / lifestyle creators
• Girls comfortable filming casual home-style content

If interested, please DM me with:
• A few recent photos/videos
• Your contact information

PAID OPPORTUNITY

Got a haircut horror story?

We're casting men for a 20 minute shoot with men's hair care brand Sons - share your worst-ever cut on camera. All the details below. 

Please email me on matilda.street@wearemonty.com

items.groupTitle: LA Actors, Agents, Casting Directors, Producers
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL 🎬
We are currently seeking actors for an upcoming film project.

Role Rate: $1,000

Script Length: Approximately 40 pages

We are specifically looking for:

• Male actor, age 25–40, height 6'0"–6'5"

• African American actors, ages 25–50

Please submit:

• IMDB link (if available)

• Acting reel

• Headshot

• Resume (optional)

Serious inquiries only.

📩 Send submissions to: sirrjonesproductions@gmail.com

Looking to cast quickly and move into production.

topComments.text:
-Title?
-Union/Non Union?
-Rate...per day or flat?
-Shoot Duration?
-Shoot Date?
-Location?
-Local/Nationwide Talent?
-Submission Deadline?
-Self-Tape/In-Person auditions? 
Thanks
Emailed

items.title: 🎬 CASTING CALL 🎬

items.text:
Ashley BeLoat, Tomorrow 🗣️
Actress and model based in LA. Lead or main support in 31 vertical dramas, across most platforms: ReelShort, Dramabox, Goodshort, Netshort, Candy Jar.
Feature films include "Mother Nature and the Doomsday Prepper" (Apple TV, Amazon Prime) and "Norse Game" (filmed in the UK). Trained in Meisner at Don Bloomfield and comedy at Scott Sedita. Published in Vogue, Harper's Bazaar, Glamour, and L'Officiel.
Bring your questions. An open conversation with a working actress.
Saturday, May 30. 10 AM. Ten to fifteen people in the room.

You can use this link to get 20% off your ticket: www.eventbrite.com/e/1989346861013/?discount=leadrole 

Event organizer: https://www.instagram.com/the_film_circle?igsh=MXZicmo2anV1ODVxYg==

items.text:
Turn VO Auditions Into Bookings

Marc Graue’s audition techniques focus on making strong, authentic choices, bringing scripts to life, and standing out in a crowded marketplace. His animation character training helps actors create memorable, believable characters with unique voices, personalities, and emotional depth—skills that can elevate both auditions and bookings
#MarcGraue, #VoiceOverCoach, #VoiceActing, #VoiceOverAuditions, #AnimationVoiceOver, #CharacterVoices, #VoiceOverTips, #VoiceActor, #AnimationActing, #VoiceOverTeacher #VideoGameVoiceActor, #AuditionTips, #VoiceOverTraining, #VoiceOverCareer, #CartoonVoices, #VoiceOverSuccess, #CharacterCreation, #VoiceOverLife, #DemoProducer, #HollywoodVoiceOver, #VoiceActingCoach

items.text:
Havregrød og æbler! Jeg spiser det 3 gange om dagen, og jeg taber mig! Intet mel, intet sukker! 
Ingredienser:
Havregryn: 1 kop (90 g)
Varm mælk: 150 ml (ca. 2/3 kop)
Æbler: 2, skrællede og skåret i tern
Smør: 20 g (1 1/2 spiseskefuld), smeltet
Vanilje: 1/2 tsk (eller vaniljeekstrakt)
Æg: 2 store...
 Du er nødt til at sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter. ... Tak.
Fuld opskrift:

items.text:
PROJECT TITLE:
WE THE PEOPLE (Historical Feature Film)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
We are an American film team traveling to the UK this summer to film portions of a historical feature project centered around the life and work of William Tyndale. The film explores the events surrounding Tyndale's translation of the Bible into English and the impact it had on England and beyond.

LOCATION:
Oxford area, England (exact locations to be provided to selected applicants)

CASTING REQUIREMENTS:

Tyndale's Father (paid)
• Male
• Playing age: 50–60

Tyndale's Mother
• Female
• Playing age: 40–50

Young John Matthews (paid)
• Male
• Playing age: 8–12

We are also open to hearing from other actors in the Oxford region who may be interested in future opportunities within the project.

DATE & TIME:
Filming will take place during our UK production period in late July / early August 2026. Exact dates and call times will be provided to shortlisted applicants.

PAYMENT:
Some roles are paid and some are volunteer positions depending on role size of the above mentioned role.

Meals will be provided on filming days. Additional travel or accommodation support may be available depending on the role and circumstances.

TO APPLY:
Please complete the interest form below:
https://forms.monday.com/forms/7c42bb9e45981cd56457bf67e9cdf6be?r=use1

Questions? Feel free to reach out to filmproductions@awmcharis.com

Please feel free to share with local theatre groups, schools, churches, drama societies, and anyone who may be interested.
